summary: Iteration 88 testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: Executive Dashboard with 12 KPIs, revenue trend (6 months with 3-dept stacked area), revenue by dept bar chart, attendance donut, gender pie (compact), course bifurcation bars, revenue by course bars, salary+commission payout panel, top 3 dept performers, dept headcount, lead sources, expiring documents, recent enrollments. Chat page shows status dots (green/amber/gray) on user avatars and Online/Away/Offline text in new chat dialog. Sidebar has Executive Dashboard and Team Chat sections. Operations sidebar does NOT have Dashboard link (verified in code).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/executive/dashboard returns enriched data with kpis (sales_revenue, cs_revenue, mentor_revenue, active_pipeline, pending_activations, pending_leaves), attendance (present, half_day, absent, on_leave, warning), gender_breakdown, monthly_trend (6 months with sales/cs/mentors), revenue_by_course, top_performers.sales, top_performers.cs (using cs_agent_name), top_performers.mentors, revenue_split, course_bifurcation, expiring_documents, salary_payout (total_gross, total_commission, total_payout, employee_count), recent_enrollments. 2) GET /api/chat/users returns 85+ users with status field (online/away/offline). 3) POST /api/chat/heartbeat updates user last_active. 4) GET /api/hr/shifts returns grace_minutes: 30 for all shifts. 5) Frontend Executive Dashboard at /executive shows all 12 widgets with proper data-testid attributes. 6) Chat page at /chat shows status dots on user avatars and Online/Away/Offline text in new chat dialog. 7) Sidebar has Executive and Team Chat sections. 8) Operations sidebar does NOT have Dashboard link (verified in Layout.jsx code).

executive_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/executive/dashboard returns all required fields: kpis, attendance, gender_breakdown, monthly_trend (6 months), revenue_by_course, top_performers (sales/cs/mentors), revenue_split, course_bifurcation, expiring_documents, salary_payout, recent_enrollments

chat_users_with_status.details: GET /api/chat/users returns 85+ users with status field (online/away/offline). Status calculated based on last_active timestamp.

chat_heartbeat.details: POST /api/chat/heartbeat updates user last_active in DB. Returns {ok: true}.

attendance_grace_minutes.details: GET /api/hr/shifts returns all shifts with grace_minutes: 30 (Morning, Afternoon, India shifts)

executive_dashboard_ui.details: Executive Dashboard at /executive shows: 12 KPIs (Total Revenue, Sales, CS Revenue, Academics, Salary Payout, Total Payout, New Leads Today, Active Pipeline, Pending Activations, Employees, Present Today, Pending Approvals), Revenue Trend (6 months stacked area with Sales/CS/Academics), Revenue by Department bar chart, Attendance Today donut, Gender Bifurcation pie (compact), Course Bifurcation bars, Revenue by Course bars, Salary + Commission Payout panel, Top Sales/CS/Academics performers, Department Headcount, Lead Sources, Expiring Documents, Recent Enrollments

chat_status_dots.details: Chat page shows green/amber/gray status dots on user avatars. New chat dialog shows Online/Away/Offline text next to each user.

sidebar_sections.details: Sidebar has Executive section with Executive Dashboard link. Team Chat section with Team Chat link. Operations section does NOT have Dashboard link (verified in Layout.jsx code lines 174-193).
